title: Iris-flood CTA end card with ignition pop
description: An accent iris floods out from behind a ghost CTA pill, the pill ignites to solid accent with a committed pop, and the supporting line settles beneath — a big, confident close.

params.name: kicker
params.description: Short line above the button that frames the ask.

params.name: label
params.description: The button copy — the one action the film asks for.

params.name: sub
params.description: Reassurance line under the button (pricing, friction-remover, URL).
params.default: Free to start · no credit card

params.name: accent
params.description: Brand token for the iris flood, ring, and ignited button.

params.name: settleSec
params.description: Seconds after scene start when the iris lands and the button ignites (leave >=1s of scene after it).
